problem id: f17db8d6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10111010 -> 11100011
  00011111 -> 01111101
  01000101 -> 00010000
  11011010 -> 01100101
  10100001 -> 10001110
  00001111 -> 00111100
  11100111 -> 10010010
  01001000 -> 00100100
  00110101 -> 11010111

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 11000011
